infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to the camera to update your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to select a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location to track driving distance for shift reports.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs background location access to accurately track your mileage even when the screen is off during a shift.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app needs background location access to accurately track your mileage during transportation shifts.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: This app needs background location access to accurately track your mileage even when the screen is off during a shift.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: This app needs background location access to accurately track your mileage during transportation shifts.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: This app needs access to your location to track driving distance for shift reports.

plugins.photosPermission: This app needs access to your photo library to select a profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: This app needs access to the camera to update your profile photo.
